Name: ITEM_LOT_PARAM2
Description: Defines item lot tables used for randomized or guaranteed item rewards, including quantities, reinforcement levels, attributes, weights, and acquisition behavior.

Fields.Name: Drop Type
Fields.Description: Specifies the item lot drop behavior or lottery type.

Fields.Name: Lottery Count
Fields.Description: Number of times the item lot lottery is rolled.

Fields.Name: Item Quantity: 1
Fields.Description: Quantity of item slot 1 granted when selected.
